title: params should not be introduced on overrides
description: "params" should not be introduced on overridesAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEconfusingWhy is this an issue?More InfoAddingparamsto a method override has no effect. The compiler accepts it, but the callers won’t be able to benefit from the added modifier.Noncompliant code exampleclass Base { public virtual void Method(int[] numbers) { ... } } class Derived : Base { public override void Method(params int[] numbers) // Noncompliant, method can't be called with params syntax.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

logic.detection_conditions: Detects override methods that introduce the params keyword when the base method doesn't have it
logic.triggering_conditions: Method is an override AND introduces params keyword for array parameter
logic.exclusion_conditions: Test methods, methods with Assert/Console/Logger/Debug calls, generated code
logic.reasoning: Adding params to an override method has no effect since callers cannot benefit from the params syntax when the base method doesn't declare it with params

should_trigger: public override void Method(params int[] numbers) { /* base method doesn't have params */ }
should_not_trigger: public override void Method(int[] numbers) { /* no params introduced */ }
